S/E OF EVICTION UNTIL NOON ON 8-5-96. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. PREMISES INCLUDE ALL GARAGE, STORAGE AND COMMON AREAS.
